query:
-- Ver produto e seu tenantId
SELECT id, sku, description, tenantId FROM products WHERE sku = '443060';

-- Ver tenant AESC Mãe de Deus
SELECT id, name, cnpj FROM tenants WHERE name LIKE '%AESC%' OR name LIKE '%Mãe%';

-- Ver inventory com tenantId explícito
SELECT i.id, i.productId, i.tenantId, i.quantity, i.status, wz.code AS zoneCode
FROM inventory i
LEFT JOIN warehouseLocations wl ON i.locationId = wl.id
LEFT JOIN warehouseZones wz ON wl.zoneId = wz.id
WHERE i.tenantId = (SELECT id FROM tenants WHERE name LIKE '%AESC%' LIMIT 1)
LIMIT 10;
